title: The Quest For Love Murder And Revenge In Space
description: The Quest for Love, Murder and Revenge in Space is a fantasy adventure showcasing the epic– oh, wait, no! It's actually a dramatic romance demonstrating the power of– oh, still wrong? That's right, it's a murder mystery in which– Wrong again? A rollicking western, perhaps? A sci-fi saga? The truth is it's none of them... and all of them! Each night our protégé arrives to find the seasoned cast in shambles. It appears that, despite perfectly reasonable instructions from the director, the show hasn't quite been settled on yet. One wants a romance while the other wants sci-fi and, in the end, it's easier to let the audience decide. So, we let them. The result? Usually, a very endearing, fully-improvised tale about the power of friendship, predictable romances, magical items, gunslinging, and a wild host of one-night-only characters. You couldn't write the stuff! Main image courtesy of Pete Burnett.
content_warnings: We do not expect the show to be triggering in any respect

reviews.excerpt: “The Quest for Love, Murder and Revenge in Space is a fantasy adventure showcasing the epic– oh, wait, no! It’s actually a dramatic romance demonstrating the power of– oh, still wrong? That’s right, it’s a murder mystery in which– Wrong again? A rollicking western, perhaps? A sci-fi saga?” This is classic improv comedy story theater theatre. Do you want a Western, some science fiction or a fantasy
